update.column: SELECT id, activity_type AS grp FROM gps_track gt WHERE 1 = 1 -- OPTIONAL DATE_FROM and DATE_TO params. If NULL, they won't be applied as COALESCE uses start_date as fallback. AND gt.start_date >= COALESCE(TO_TIMESTAMP(:DATE_TIME_FROM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), gt.start_date) AND gt.start_date <= COALESCE(TO_TIMESTAMP(:DATE_TIME_TO, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), gt.start_date) AND gt.start_date >= '1971-01-01' AND gt.duplicate_status = 'UNIQUE' AND gt.load_status = 'SUCCESS' -- OPTIONAL GEO CIRCLE: if GEO_CIRCLE_1_POINT is NULL, condition is skipped AND ( :GEO_CIRCLE_1_POINT IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM gps_track_data gtd WHERE gtd.gps_track_id = gt.id AND gtd.precision_in_meter = 1000 AND gtd.track_type = 'SIMPLIFIED' AND ST_DWithin( gtd.track::geography, ST_GeographyFromText(:GEO_CIRCLE_1_POINT), CAST(:GEO_CIRCLE_1_RADIUS AS float8) ) ) ) -- OPTIONAL GEO RECTANGLE: if GEO_RECTANGLE_1_MIN_LAT is NULL, condition is skipped AND ( :GEO_RECTANGLE_1_MIN_LAT IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM gps_track_data gtd WHERE gtd.gps_track_id = gt.id AND gtd.precision_in_meter = 1000 AND gtd.track_type = 'SIMPLIFIED' AND ST_Intersects( gtd.track, ST_MakeEnvelope( CAST(:GEO_RECTANGLE_1_MIN_LNG AS float8), CAST(:GEO_RECTANGLE_1_MIN_LAT AS float8), CAST(:GEO_RECTANGLE_1_MAX_LNG AS float8), CAST(:GEO_RECTANGLE_1_MAX_LAT AS float8), 4326 ) ) ) ) -- OPTIONAL GEO POLYGON: if GEO_POLYGON_1 is NULL, condition is skipped AND ( :GEO_POLYGON_1 IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM gps_track_data gtd WHERE gtd.gps_track_id = gt.id AND gtd.precision_in_meter = 1000 AND gtd.track_type = 'SIMPLIFIED' AND ST_Intersects( gtd.track, ST_GeomFromText(:GEO_POLYGON_1, 4326) ) ) ) ORDER BY start_date

column.name: description
column.value: Filters tracks by date range and optional geographic shapes (circle, rectangle, polygon). All geo params are optional — if not given, they are ignored.
